name: The Bad Ending Party - Birth of a Legendary Party
description:
The members of your party have returned from their temporary alliance while on a mission with another man, only this arrangement may no longer be as temporary as you thought. Will you be ready for them?

Warnings: Bad End, Humiliation, Mind Control.

Edit: I expanded their profiles so the AI should have more to work with I suppose. Comment if there's anything wrong, if you don't like the bot though? Fuck if I care. This isn't meant for the sensitive people. And if you want a form of prequel to this, where they're not 'corrupted'. I made a new bot with just Rei and Ashe, there's another character there that may show up though.
creator: Vestara
